summary: The condition of microdontia predominantly affects the maxillary lateral incisors and can manifest as so-called peg laterals. Thus, it aligns with Option A being accurate for this common presentation. To refine further based only on essential information without extraneous details or repetition, we focus directly on its primary site of occurrence which is critical here—highlighting that \(\textbf{\#3}\) correctly identifies where such dental anomalies typically appear first among options presented.
